#### [The Nigerian dream of freedom](https://thenationonlineng.net/the-nigerian-dream-of-freedom/)

[3 years ago](https://muckrack.com/link/y7AXYQ/the-nigerian-dream-of-freedom)\|




By [Oluwaseyi Oso](https://muckrack.com/oluwaseyi-oso)
\|[The Nation (Nigeria)](https://muckrack.com/media-outlet/thenationonlineng) Verified





By Oluwaseyi Oso Some years ago, I had a memorable encounter with a friend who possessed an unwavering thirst for freedom and hope. Whenever an aeroplane passed overhead, he would stop walking and fix his gaze upon it. The look on his face whenever he stopped to watch an aeroplane whirling by, no matter how intense our conversation was, landed in my mind recently.

#### [Buhari mourns former Chairman, Abia State Council of Traditional Rulers, Eze Bernard Enweremadu  - Global Patriot Newspapers](https://globalpatriotnews.com/buhari-mourns-former-chairman-abia-state-council-of-traditional-rulers-eze-bernard-enweremadu/)

[5 years ago](https://muckrack.com/link/osRA7B/buhari-mourns-former-chairman-abia-state-council-of-traditional-rulers-eze-bernard-enweremadu-global-patriot-newspapers)\|




By [Lere Abinuwa](https://muckrack.com/lere-abinuwa), [Bola Bolawole](https://muckrack.com/bola-bolawole), [Oluwaseyi Oso](https://muckrack.com/oluwaseyi-oso)
\|[Global Patriot News](https://muckrack.com/media-outlet/globalpatriotnews) Verified





Home / News / Local / Buhari mourns former Chairman, Abia State Council of Traditional Rulers, Eze Bernard Enweremadu admin 1 min ago Local, News 0 Views Eze Bernard Enweremadu President Muhammadu Buhari has sent condolences to the family of former Chairman, Abia State Council of Traditional Rulers, Sir Bernard Enweremadu, Ezeukwu of Ngwaukwu, praying that God will grant the renowned traditional ruler a peaceful rest.

#### [Nine years after, Zulum reopens Bama-Banki-Cameroon Road  - Global Patriot Newspapers](https://globalpatriotnews.com/nine-years-after-zulum-reopens-bama-banki-cameroon-road/)

[5 years ago](https://muckrack.com/link/osRJx9/nine-years-after-zulum-reopens-bama-banki-cameroon-road-global-patriot-newspapers)\|




By [Lere Abinuwa](https://muckrack.com/lere-abinuwa), [Bola Bolawole](https://muckrack.com/bola-bolawole), [Oluwaseyi Oso](https://muckrack.com/oluwaseyi-oso)
\|[Global Patriot News](https://muckrack.com/media-outlet/globalpatriotnews) Verified





… Gives Army 10 operational vehicles …. Warns against extortion, smuggling With full participation of the Nigerian military, Borno Governor, Babagana Umara Zulum, on Wednesday, reopened the 65km Bama-Banki boarder road which links to Cameroon and parts of Central Africa. The road had been shut since around 2012 arising from activities of Boko Haram. Zulum, alongside the Theatre Commander, ‘Operation Hadin Kai’, Major General Musa Christopher, traveled to the border town from Maiduguri.
